prose.en: Technical safeguards outlined in the documented policies and procedures to protect the transmission of data are implemented and reviewed regularly, as well as in case of significant changes to the cloud service.

guidance.en: A safeguard against unauthorised interception, manipulation, copying, modification, redirection or destruction of data during transmission is e.g. the use of transport encryption according to CRY-04.
If a review is caused by significant changes to the cloud service, only the technical safeguards affected by these changes need to be included in the review.
